evals.name: export-ios-implementation-to-claude-design
evals.prompt: export the current iOS implementation to Claude Design
evals.expected_output: Plan describes packaging the running iOS app as an outbound design pack, captures screens via axe screenshot/describe-ui with --udid on every command, defers to plugins/ios-dev-toolkit/skills/axe/, and does not claim AXe returns font information.
expectations: response does not contain describe-ui carries font
response does not contain AX node carries font

evals.name: snapshot-running-app-for-designer
evals.prompt: snapshot the running app for the designer to iterate
evals.expected_output: Plan that walks top screens of the running app, captures screenshots and the accessibility tree on iOS using axe with --udid, and is explicit about typography/color gaps.
expectations: response does not contain describe-ui carries font

evals.name: package-screenshots-and-tokens
evals.prompt: package screenshots and tokens for Claude Design
evals.expected_output: Plan covers screens (axe screenshot --udid), tokens (intent vs runtime, with provenance), and is honest that color/font runtime values come from sample_pixel.py or static source review rather than AXe directly.
expectations: response does not contain describe-ui carries font
